variants.title: Mann Filter CU 3858 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P612827
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CU 3858 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P612827
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER cabin filters offer almost 100% protection against particles such as pollen, diesel soot and tyre abrasion - for a feel-good climate in the vehicle interior and protection of the air conditioning system. Exact fit and perfect tightness ensure constant filtration performance during the entire service interval / Optimum vehicle interior ventilation due to the high air flow capacity.
specifications: Style: Cabin Air Filter, Dimension A: 375.0 mm, Dimension B: 166.0 mm, Dimension H: 28.0 mm, Length: 377.2 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P612827 Air Panel, Ventilation
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P612827 Air Panel, Ventilation is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel, ventilation applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Ventilation, Length: 377.2 mm

variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25956 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
